zh.lifeSummary: William Comyn於1165年出生。他於1217年之前與wife William Comyn在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1233年享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Comyn于1165年出生。他于1217年之前与wife William Comyn在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1233年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Comyn was born in 1165. He married wife William Comyn before 1217, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1233, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: William Comyn est né en 1165. Il a épousé wife William Comyn avant 1217, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1233, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Comyn wurde 1165 geboren. Er hat vor 1217 in Europa wife William Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1233 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: William Comyn è nato il nel 1165. Lui sposato wife William Comyn prima del 1217, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1233, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Comynは1165年に生まれた。1217年以前にヨーロッパでwife William Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1233年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Comyn(은)는 1165년 태어났다. 그는 1217년 이전 우럽에서 wife William Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1233년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Comyn nasceu em 1165. Ele casou-se com wife William Comyn antes 1217, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1233, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Comyn родился в 1165 г. Он женился на женщине по имени wife William Comyn перед 1217 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1233 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Comyn nació en 1165. Se casó con wife William Comyn antes de 1217, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1233, a la edad de 68 años.
